Patent Incentives
PATENTS & COPYRIGHTS
At Sri Eshwar, we provide expert guidance on patents and copyrights to protect valuable ideas as intellectual property. Our Intellectual Property Rights team assists faculty and students in navigating the patent application process for their inventions, including conducting novelty searches, drafting applications, and managing submissions. We also assist in the registration of copyrights to protect original research works. Our team follow all legal requirements and standards. The dedicated IPR cell at Sri Eshwar is committed to protecting our innovations and creative works, enabling our community to focus on advancing their research and development efforts.
